segments.text: But if this ledge trap keeps up...
segments.original_text: しかしこの崖攻めが続くのならば

segments.text: That shield's gonna recover before they even know it!
segments.original_text: シールドの残り寿命など気づけば回復していることでしょう
なおちゃ選手の攻めが止まらない

segments.text: That answered the ledge situation, but...
segments.original_text: 崖上に対しての回答だったがここは

full_text: Clinging to life! But if this ledge trap keeps up... That shield's gonna recover before they even know it! Naocha's not letting up! That answered the ledge situation, but...
